#  Resource Tracking And Unit Quantity Based Budget Setup Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Enter Production Quantities in Timesheets 
###  Steps 
  1. If creating a timesheet, after you have entered the timecard information, click **Submit and Add Quantities.  
**![Submit And Add Timesheet Quantities](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d404c3facb8129590fadba0489ee4709/8a1d0dae5a4baf8b969935ca142d3cf4/submit-and-add-timesheet-quantities.png?fm=webp)**  
**OR  
If the timesheet has already been created, navigate to the timesheet, and click **Add Quantities** for the timecard entry.
  2. Enter the amount of **Units Installed.  
**
#####  Note
     * You can only use cost codes that have an imported budgeted quantity associated with it.
  3. _Optional:_ Enter any **notes**.
  4. Click **Submit.**


[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-unit-quantity-based-budget-setup-guide/enter-time-in-timesheets/)
[ View the Labor Budget to Actual Report ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-unit-quantity-based-budget-setup-guide/view-the-labor-budget-to-actual-report/)
